news.title: 1 dead, 3 injured after shooting at Atlanta apartment complex
news.summary: Atlanta police are investigating after multiple people were shot on Friday afternoon.

news.title: College Park fire investigators search for possible serial arsonist
news.summary: Fire officials are tracking a suspected College Park arsonist linked to seven intentionally set neighborhood fires.

news.title: Old Fourth Ward violence: 3 injured, 1 dead in Atlanta shooting
news.summary: An 18-year-old man died and three others were injured Friday after an Atlanta apartment shooting in the Old Fourth Ward.

news.title: Tyler Perry to pay for funeral of young man found dead on Mississippi coast
news.summary: Atlanta media mogul Tyler Perry is paying for the funeral of an 18-year-old man who was found dead off of Mississippi Gulf Coast after a July 4th weekend trip with friends.

news.title: Woodstock man gets 25 years without parole for rape
news.summary: A Woodstock man will spend 25 years in prison without parole after being convicted of rape in Cherokee County.

news.title: 1 dead, 3 injured after shooting in Old Fourth Ward, police say
news.summary: Shell casings and blood could be seen surrounding a scooter in front of the apartment building. Boulevard NE has also been closed near the scene.

news.title: Pregnant mother, unborn baby killed in DeKalb County ATV crash
news.summary: An ATV accident in DeKalb County killed a 28-year-old pregnant mother and her unborn baby.

news.title: Firefighter battles angry wasps from nest on hydrant during house fire
news.summary: A metro Atlanta officer came to the aid of a firefighter who stirred up a wasp’s nest.

news.title: Teen found dead in Atlanta was wanted in Rome for shooting
news.summary: Atlanta police have identified the teenage victim found dead days after a Fourth of July shooting in southwest Atlanta.

news.title: Gwinnett RICO case sends two Sureño gang members to prison for 20 years
news.summary: The Gwinnett County District Attorney's Office announced a guilty verdict and sentencing Friday in a drugs/gang case.

news.title: 18-year-old driver accused of killing grandmother while leading police on high-speed chase indicted
news.summary: The DeKalb County District Attorney's Office on Friday announced the indictment of Joseph Odeh in the death 0f 56-year-old Antoinette Catchings in April.

news.title: Alpharetta therapist charged with child cruelty in alleged incident with patient; attorney 'categorically denies' accusation
news.summary: An arrest warrant in the case alleges the victim had "visible scratches and bruises." An attorney for the accused said she "unequivocally maintains her innocence."
